scripts.test:script: npx vite-node tests/provider-adapters.smoke.test.ts && npx vite-node tests/e2e/intent_router_e2e.test.ts && API_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:5173/api/lix npx vite-node tests/lix-v02-compliance.test.ts && API_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:5173/api/lix npx vite-node tests/lix-validation.test.ts
scripts.debug:all: /bin/sh -lc 'npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run test:life-optimizer && { npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173 >/tmp/lumi-debug-dev.log 2>&1 & DEV_PID=$!; sleep 2; npm run test:script && npm run test:e2e; STATUS=$?; kill $DEV_PID; wait $DEV_PID 2>/dev/null; exit $STATUS; }'
